summary: Backend: 9/9 iter48 tests pass; 44/44 regression (test_appeals + test_iter27_auth_refactor + test_security_middleware + test_iter47_security_review) pass; 4 rate-limit tests skipped (RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=false in preview — expected). Frontend: admin can load /admin/security via the preview URL, all 4 summary cards + 5 panels render, admin-nav-security link visible only for admin, employee token gets 403 from the API and the Spanish toast 'Solo los administradores pueden ver este panel.' appears. Revoke button renders per staff session and window.confirm() dialog is triggered correctly. Fixed one blocker: `ShieldAlert` icon was used in AdminPanel.jsx line 52 but not imported from lucide-react (would crash the admin nav render).

ui_bugs.issue: `ShieldAlert` used as icon for admin-nav-security link but NOT imported from lucide-react — crashed the entire admin sidebar for role=admin. FIXED by adding ShieldAlert to the lucide-react import.

action_items: None blocking. iter48 is GREEN end-to-end after ShieldAlert import fix.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPanel.jsx: fixed missing ShieldAlert import; the crash would have been silent in dev because JSX resolves lucide identifiers at render time only.

services/security_events.py doc-comment mentions a TTL index (30-day retention) but ensure_indexes() only creates non-TTL indexes — the collection will grow unbounded. If desired, add `create_index('created_at', expireAfterSeconds=2592000)` on a Date field (need to store `_ts: datetime.now(timezone.utc)` alongside the ISO string). Not blocking for iter48.

routes/admin_security.py `_recent_login_bursts`: pulls last 200 login_attempts and groups client-side — fine for now but O(N) memory. For high-traffic prod, prefer an aggregation pipeline mirroring `_top_rate_limited_ips`.
AdminSecurity.jsx uses `window.confirm` for the revoke action; acceptable but consider a shadcn AlertDialog for consistency with the rest of the admin UI.
test_credentials: Used /app/memory/test_credentials.md — admin_test_admin01 / employee_test_employee01 session tokens seeded by conftest.
seed_data_creation: None. conftest autoseed_sessions fixture handles session tokens. iter48 test itself plants+cleans one session doc for user_test_normal01.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter48 admin security dashboard GREEN. Frontend nav link `admin-nav-security` is rendered only when user.role==='admin' (spread in AdminPanel.jsx line 49-55). The dashboard route path is `/admin/security` and admin-only. The revoke button triggers window.confirm(); handle that with page.once('dialog', ...) in Playwright. Origin-blocked events are only reliably created against http://localhost:8001 (backend) because the Emergent proxy rewrites Origin — see test_iter48_admin_security.LOCAL_API. Rate-limit tests are skipped when RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=false (current preview state).
rca of the issue: AdminPanel.jsx line 52 references `ShieldAlert` (lucide icon) but the top-of-file import statement listed only `Shield`. React swallows undefined component identifiers until render-time — so build/lint didn't flag it, but the moment an admin loaded the panel the nav would throw 'ShieldAlert is not defined' and blank the sidebar. Fixed by adding ShieldAlert to the lucide-react import.
